CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(HeatMap_Column__r.Column_Filter__c, 'Product Editions'), Product_Edition__c, /* Prioritize Product Edition */ /* Existing logic excluding Product Edition */ IF( ISPICKVAL(Automated_Value__c, 'Protected'), IF( Automated_LCD__c > (NOW() - 90), 'Protected', /* Automated is present and recent */ IF( TEXT(Manual_Workload_Value__c) != null, TEXT(Manual_Workload_Value__c), /* Automated is present but stale, manual overrides */ 'Not Protected' /* Automated is present but stale and manual is null */ ) ), IF( TEXT(Manual_Workload_Value__c) != null, TEXT(Manual_Workload_Value__c), /* If Automated is not present and manual is */ null /* Default null when no conditions are met */ ) ) )
CustomField.label: Final Workload Value
